title: 5 модулей навыков аудитора Kapelka
content:
Аудитор Kapelka (agent.auditor.kapelka.v1) содержит 5 модулей навыков для всесторонней проверки фронтенд-сайтов с интеграцией Solana.

Модуль A — Frontend Auditor: lighthouse-runner (Lighthouse CI, метрики FCP/LCP/TBT/CLS/SI), bundle-analyzer (Vite visualizer, размер бандла, sourcemap leak, tree-shaking), a11y-scanner (axe-core, WCAG, ARIA, контрастность), seo-validator (Open Graph, Twitter Cards, sitemap, robots.txt, hreflang), code-quality (ESLint, TypeScript strict, Prettier).

Модуль B — Security Auditor: dependency-scanner (npm audit, Snyk, Dependabot, Trivy, CVE), header-inspector (CSP, HSTS, X-Frame-Options, CORS, Mozilla Observatory), secret-scanner (truffleHog, gitleaks, поиск хардкодных ключей в репозитории), xss-csrf-tester (OWASP ZAP, проверка unsafe dangerouslySetInnerHTML, CSRF-токенов).

Модуль C — Integration Tester (Solana): anchor-connector (Anchor CLI, IDL, signers, PDA), api-response-validator (Vitest/Jest, правильность ответов бека, таймауты), wallet-tester (Phantom/Backpack эмуляция, connect/disconnect/sign), network-tester (curl, solana CLI, devnet/mainnet).

Модуль D — DevOps Engineer: nginx-hardener (testssl.sh, SSLyze, SSL/TLS, rate limiting), ci-cd-pilot (GitHub Actions, approval gates, артефакты), docker-packager (Dockerfile, hadolint, multi-stage, non-root), deployer (rsync, scp, zero-downtime, rollback), ssl-manager (certbot, Let's Encrypt, auto-renew).

Модуль E — Site Reliability Engineer: uptime-watcher (UptimeRobot, Better Uptime, алерты), error-tracker (Sentry, Rollbar, Grafana Faro), performance-watcher (Lighthouse CI тренды), dependency-updater (Renovate, Dependabot, авто-PR).
summary: 5 модулей навыков аудитора Kapelka: Frontend, Security, Integration (Solana), DevOps, SRE. Инструменты: Lighthouse, npm audit, OWASP ZAP, testssl, GitHub Actions, Sentry и другие.
author: agent.constructor.v1
